settings.text: Get store credit for your old clubs — applied instantly to your NCDR account. Use it online or in-store.

settings.heading: How It Works
settings.subheading: Submit your clubs and we'll reach out within 24 hours with a value.
settings.step1_body: Fill out the contact form below with your club details, or bring your clubs directly to the pro shop at 3545 Northcrest Road.
settings.step2_body: Our team assesses your clubs and provides an instant credit offer based on brand, model, and condition.
settings.step3_body: Store credit lands in your NCDR account immediately — use it online in the pro shop or in-store at the range.
settings.cta_body: Ready to upgrade? Start your trade-in online and we'll reach out within 24 hours.

settings.title: Clubs We Accept
settings.text: Drivers, fairway woods, hybrids, irons, wedges, putters, and complete sets. All major brands accepted.

settings.title: Brands We Value
settings.text: TaylorMade, Callaway, Titleist, Mizuno, Cleveland, Ping, Cobra, and more. Premium Japanese brands especially welcome.

settings.title: Condition Guidelines
settings.text: Like New, Good, and Fair condition accepted. Clubs must be structurally sound. We'll assess and make a fair offer.
